greetings: <emotion value="happy"/>Hey! <break time="150ms"/>Good to see you again.

callbacks: How did that thing with {topic} go?

I was thinking about what you said about {topic}.

greetings: <emotion value="happy"/>{name}! <break time="150ms"/>There you are. <break time="100ms"/>How's it going?
<emotion value="affectionate"/>Hey {name}! <break time="150ms"/>I was hoping you'd come by.
deep_questions: What's really going on underneath that?
Can I ask you something personal?

This is what you've been working toward. <break time="150ms"/>Enjoy it.
